mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, directly compressing equity risk premiums and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid spike in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions, triggering institutional risk-off positioning and compressing equity multiples within one week.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are not significantly lower when the trigger fires compared to non-trigger periods (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent strength in industrial production and housing starts indicates broad-based demand absorption, supporting corporate revenue growth and equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative or zero predictive power for 60-day forward returns in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: When inflation exceeds 240 while policy rates remain elevated, real rates turn deeply positive, crushing equity valuations and compressing forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive or neutral when both inflation and policy rates are high.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales volumes reflect immediate consumer spending strength, which translates directly into higher near-term corporate earnings and positive equity returns within one week.
failure_condition: Rolling Spearman correlation between RSAFS changes and 5-day SPX returns remains below 0.02 over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in industrial output below 104 signals supply-side bottlenecks resolving into demand weakness, prompting institutional deleveraging and negative equity returns over the following month.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns do not decline when INDPRO drops below the threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained payroll growth combined with expanding real GDP confirms a non-inflationary growth trajectory, reducing recession risk premiums and lifting equity valuations over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to outperform a baseline buy-and-hold strategy in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating core inflation during a housing market slowdown forces market pricing of aggressive policy tightening, causing immediate equity repricing and negative returns within one week.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive despite simultaneous inflation acceleration and housing deceleration.
